# CloudRent Pro - Rental Management Software

> CloudRent Pro is a complete rental management software built in Australia for equipment hire businesses. It provides cloud-based tools for managing bookings, invoicing, customers, digital signatures, and accounting integrations.

## About CloudRent Pro

CloudRent Pro is rental management software designed specifically for Australian equipment hire businesses. From a single excavator to a fleet of thousands, CloudRent Pro helps hire companies manage their entire operation.

## Key Features

- Real-time equipment availability and booking calendar
- One-click invoicing with Stripe payment processing
- Digital signatures for rental agreements, delivery dockets, and SWMS
- Two-way Xero, QuickBooks, and MYOB integration
- SWMS and safety documentation
- Stocktakes and asset management
- Inspection forms and checklists
- Tiered pricing engine
- Marketing system and bulk email
- GPS and telematics tracking
- AI-powered support agent
- Customer portal for 24/7 self-service bookings
- Mobile app for field staff with offline sync
- Driver app (free) for delivery teams

## Pricing

- Starter: $49/user/month - Basic features for small operators
- Professional: $85/user/month - Full toolkit including Xero integration
- Business: $129/user/month - Enterprise features with dedicated support

### CloudRent Pro Launch Offer

Limited offer for first 100 customers: Get the full Business plan (every feature) locked in at $85/user/month forever. This rate never increases as long as you remain subscribed.

Sign up: https://app.cloudrent.me/founder

## Platform Coverage

1. **Web App** - Full-featured cloud platform accessible from any browser
2. **Mobile App** - iOS and Android apps with offline sync, barcode scanning, push notifications ($10/user/month)
3. **Customer Portal** - 24/7 self-service for customers to make bookings, view history, download invoices ($49/month)
4. **Driver App** - Free app for delivery staff to view jobs, accept/decline, GPS clock-in

## Add-Ons

- Mobile App Access: $10/user/month
- Customer Portal: $49/month + $200 setup
- Additional Xero Entities: $10/entity/month
- SMS Notifications: Usage-based (Twilio)
- Professional Onboarding: $499 one-off
